description: AnythingLLM can connect to local and hosted LLMs suitable for Qwen2.5 chat workflows.

sources.title: AnythingLLM GitHub repository
sources.quote: AnythingLLM is the all-in-one AI application that lets you build a private, fully-featured ChatGPT—without compromises. Connect your favorite local or cloud LLM, ingest your documents, and start chatting in minutes. Out of the box you get built-in agents, multi-user support, vector databases, and document pipelines — no extra configuration required.

description: AnythingLLM supports embedding-model-backed retrieval workflows.

sources.title: AnythingLLM GitHub repository
sources.quote: - If using an external tool, LLM, Embedding models, or Vector databases, you will still see outbound connections to the respective service provider. - `cdn.anythingllm.com` for pulling models from our mirror CDN. This is not tracked by telemetry and is actually useful for those in VPN restricted regions. - `github/githubusercontent.com` There are some various flat files that are downloaded from these domains for context window caching.

description: AnythingLLM supports local model runtimes including Ollama.

sources.title: AnythingLLM GitHub repository
sources.quote: AnythingLLM supports multiple users as well where you can control the access and experience per user without compromising the security or privacy of the instance or your intellectual property.

description: AnythingLLM is licensed under MIT.

description: Jan supports local chat with open-weight models.

sources.title: Jan GitHub repository
sources.quote: - **Local AI Models**: Download and run LLMs (Llama, Gemma, Qwen, GPT-oss etc.) from HuggingFace - **Cloud Integration**: Connect to GPT models via OpenAI, Claude models via Anthropic, Mistral, Groq, MiniMax, and others - **Custom Assistants**: Create specialized AI assistants for your tasks - **OpenAI-Compatible API**: Local server at `localhost:1337` for other applications - **Model Context Protocol**: MCP integration for agentic capabilities - **Privacy First**: Everything runs locally when you want it to

description: Jan supports local chat with open-weight Mistral-family models.
